calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Both Defendants
Off Calendar Apr-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, CSR: Sara Lerschen, #6213.

David P. Adams, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Bank of the West, a California Banking Corporation.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Dohrn AG Service Inc., a Minnesota Corporation; Brian Dohrn, an individual.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $68,482.92
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $1,608.46
Costs: $696.75
Total Judgment in the amount of $70,788.13
Judgment signed in open court.
